level_signals: 12+ years of experience as a Product Manager
Experience developing a multi-year vision, strategy and roadmap for large-scale products
Experience leading cross-team initiatives from ideation to execution

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: 12+ years of experience as a Product Manager
Deep user empathy and a high bar for user experience
Experience developing a multi-year vision, strategy and roadmap for large-scale products
Experience leading cross-team initiatives from ideation to execution
Technical expertise: You've led technical products and/or have a background in computer science (or similar)
Strong written and verbal communication skills

scope.surface: Stripe's user-facing AI agent platform for support experience, including merchant dashboard, consumer apps, and third-party agent surfaces
scope.business_model: B2B and B2C financial infrastructure platform
primary_metrics_inferred: AI agent resolution rate vs. human agents
Platform adoption by internal product teams
Feedback loop efficiency (conversation → eval → prompt improvement cycle)
core_responsibilities: Create the home for product teams to safely build out, understand and improve their conversational experiences.
Build feedback loops from conversations through improvement recommendations to generating evals and prompts.
Make Stripe's conversational AI agent as capable and effective as our best human agents by identifying scaled ways to improve its capabilities across surfaces, user segments and products.
Integrate human and AI conversations in the platform so that teams can understand and manage both.

Develop the infrastructure that enables internal and external AI experiences to be driven from the same foundational primitives - so that teams can build once and have that capability available to internal, external and third-party use cases.
Partner with GTM on expanding assistive capabilities to Stripe's GTM layer.
Partner with the Conversation UX team to unlock novel capabilities for the AI agent.

green_flags: Clear and specific product surface described (AI support agent platform)
Explicit encouragement to apply if minimum requirements are met, acknowledging preferred qualifications are a bonus
High-impact, high-visibility role at the forefront of applied AI
Clear articulation of responsibilities and scope
red_flags: Location/remote policy not stated in JD — unclear whether role is remote, hybrid, or onsite
Visa sponsorship and work authorization not mentioned
No preferred qualifications listed, making differentiation between candidates harder to anticipate
12+ years requirement is a high bar that eliminates many strong AI PM candidates

fields_inferred_not_stated: seniority.level inferred from title ('Staff') and years requirement (12+)
seniority.manages_people inferred as false — no direct reports or people management mentioned
scope.primary_metrics_inferred — not stated in JD, inferred from responsibilities
location.type set to 'unclear' — no location or work policy information in JD body
compensation.equity_mentioned set to false — not mentioned in JD
